# Blacksmith Benchmark Snapshot

<!-- Generated by .github/workflows/tool-benchmark.yml. Do not edit benchmark numbers by hand. -->

This page is updated by the Tool Benchmark workflow when it is run manually with `commit_results` enabled. Until then, use the workflow artifact named `tool-benchmark` for the latest Blacksmith 32 vCPU comparison.

The workflow writes:

- `tool-benchmark-summary.md` for PR comments and release notes
- `tool-benchmark-results.json` for downstream processing
- this page for published documentation

The default documentation run uses `blacksmith-32vcpu-ubuntu-2404`, 15,000 generated SFC files for compile/lint/format, 500 files for type checking, 1,000 imports for the Vite build, 1 warmup, and 5 measured runs.
